caption: A man with a beard and shaved sides of his head wears black over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Energetic". He is positioned in a recording studio against a wall of dark gray acoustic foam panels. He speaks into a professional condenser microphone mounted on a boom arm. As the sequence progresses, the man shifts his gaze and facial expression; he begins by looking slightly downward and to the left while speaking, then looks forward with an open mouth, before shifting his eyes toward the right side of the frame. His right arm, which has tattoos, is partially visible. The setting and equipment remain static throughout the clip, while the man's head movements and expressions change as he talks.
